title: K3s Deploy CLI Configuration
description: Configuration file for the K3s Deployment CLI for Proxmox VE.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the Proxmox VE server.

user.description: Username for Proxmox VE authentication (e.g., root@pam or user@pve).

password.description: Password for Proxmox VE authentication. Optional if API token is used.

api_token_id.description: API Token ID for Proxmox VE authentication (e.g., user@pam!mytoken). Optional if password is used.

api_token_secret.description: API Token Secret for Proxmox VE authentication. Optional if password is used.

verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificate of the Proxmox VE host.

nodes.description: List of K3s nodes to be managed on Proxmox VE.

vmid.description: The Proxmox VE Virtual Machine ID.

address.description: Static IP address in CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.100/24).
